scope: Commercial print labels cartons corrugated and selected flexible packaging
primary_customer_types: Brands manufacturers agencies and local buyers
general_pattern: Job economics depend on specification material yield setup finishing rework and delivery
key_hypothesis_to_verify: Quote job card proof and stage status may be disconnected
first_real_world_action: Speak with one owner or estimator and reconstruct one completed job
research_status: Desk research complete; local validation required

scope: SME transport local fleet last-mile and small 3PL
general_pattern: Visibility requires shipment package trip status exception and proof identities
key_hypothesis_to_verify: A small exception and POD register may reduce calls and billing lag
first_real_world_action: Speak with dispatcher driver and billing user about one normal and one failed delivery
research_status: Desk research complete; local validation required

scope: Garment order from tech pack and sampling through shipment
primary_customer_types: Brands buying houses wholesalers institutions and export buyers
general_pattern: Style revision material readiness line execution quality and assortment are linked
key_hypothesis_to_verify: A style readiness board may prevent premature cutting or late line starts
first_real_world_action: Speak with merchandiser production and quality or stores roles
research_status: Desk research complete; local validation required

scope: Discrete and light make-to-order or make-to-stock production
priority_subsegment: One product family in an SME job shop
primary_customer_types: OEMs distributors institutions and end users
general_pattern: Revision material route capacity quality and delivery readiness must agree
key_hypothesis_to_verify: A work-order readiness board may expose holds before release
first_real_world_action: Select one product and process then reconstruct three work orders
research_status: Desk research complete; product boundary required

scope: Independent retail stockist and small wholesale operations
priority_subsegment: One product category with inventory exceptions
primary_customer_types: Consumers institutions contractors and small retailers
workflow_end: Sale delivery collection return and replenishment
general_pattern: Product identity unit stock price credit and return state drive fulfilment and cash
key_hypothesis_to_verify: A daily stock exception worklist may fit beside current POS
first_real_world_action: Trace twenty anonymous SKUs with owner buyer and store user
research_status: Desk research complete; category validation required
